content_body: Serendipity is a fabulous cabin that is beautifully furnished and outfitted. We had a great time out on the porches enjoying the views while soaking in the hot tub, and sitting next to the multiple fireplaces. The chefs table in the kitchen was the perfect place to enjoy wine while meals were prepared and everything needed for cooking was readily available. The screened porch with room to hang around while grilling was much appreciated and the terrace level with pool table got quite a bit of use also. This is definitely a great setting and cabin and we wish we had been able to stay longer.
title: Beautiful Mountain Lodge Overlooking Scenic Beauty
